lighting: diffuse rainy daylight from above, softened into a coral haze with tiny violet and blue pinlights at the edges
object_inventory: one dominant frosted-glass arch floating in a waxed plaster passage
one narrow inverted curtain panel suspended along the left edge
one low blackened-steel waterline crossing the floor
soft rectangular overlays and ghosted photographic texture translated from the coral reference image
nine quiet source anchors embedded as labels, slits, tiles, seams, pinlights, and chips
negative_constraints: no printmaking chapel or roller room
preserve at least 45 percent negative space
only one dominant form plus two secondary forms
no equal-weight grid of source objects
